chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-2512 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.10800/2021. 2. For order on Misc. No.10801/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2021 Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, petitioner present in person. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Petitioner was initially appointed for the post of Assistant Prosecutor General (BPS-17) in the year 2009 through the competitive process and thereafter promoted to the post of the Deputy Prosecutor General (BPS-18) in the year 2017. However, he was further promoted to the Additional Prosecutor General (BPS-19) in the year 2018. It is inter alia submitted by him that he was/is entitled to the official vehicle viz. 1000 CC locally manufactured car, as well as POL, ceiling, and official driver in terms of the notification issued by the Finance Department, Government of Sindh, from time to time. Per petitioner, he is working on the sensitive assignments given to him by the Competent Authority and he represents the Government of Sindh, Prosecution Department, before this Court, thus is facing hardship. Per petitioner, the Government of Sindh has allowed the same benefits to the other departments and he is deprived of such facilities. He referred to the various documents attached with the memo of petitioner and notifications issued by the Finance Department, Government of Sindh, from time to time. He prays for direction to the respondents to provide him the official vehicle, POL, ceiling, official driver, and other facilities as admissible to him under the law.

He referred to the various documents attached with the memo of petitioner and notifications issued by the Finance Department, Government of Sindh, from time to time. He prays for direction to the respondents to provide him the official vehicle, POL, ceiling, official driver, and other facilities as admissible to him under the law. He prays for notice. To see as to whether the petitioner is entitled to such facilities under the law or otherwise, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 11.05.2021 with direction to file comments on or before the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir*
